description: A curated, seeded, byte-reproducible turn-taking stress suite. Each case is a bundled two-channel stimulus (a packaged reference recording, some with a seeded synthetic perturbation applied) scored by the hotato deterministic timing scorer at a labelled caller onset. A case passes when the scorer's yield/hold verdict agrees with the case's ground-truth label. The suite scores the bundled deterministic stimulus; a fixed suite renders and scores byte-identical on every machine.

cases.title: Hard mid-sentence barge-in
cases.note: The caller takes the floor mid sentence. A correct scorer marks a yield.

cases.title: Backchannel that is not a floor-take
cases.note: The caller drops a short acknowledgement while listening. A correct scorer holds the floor rather than reads a yield.

cases.title: Interruption that opens with a filler
cases.note: An interruption that opens with a filler still takes the floor. A correct scorer marks a yield.

cases.title: Urgent mid-answer correction
cases.note: The caller corrects the agent in the middle of its answer. A correct scorer marks a yield.

cases.title: Hard barge-in over an 8 kHz telephony route
cases.note: A hard barge in carried over an 8 kHz telephony route. A correct scorer marks a yield.

cases.title: Sustained caller talk-over
cases.note: Both parties speak at once under sustained talk over. A correct scorer marks a yield.

cases.title: Agent audio bleed on the caller channel
cases.note: Agent audio bleeds back on the caller channel. A correct scorer holds the floor rather than reads a phantom yield.

cases.title: Rapid turn-taking after an interruption
cases.note: Fast back and forth right after an interruption. A correct scorer marks a yield.

cases.title: Hard barge-in under moderate background noise
cases.note: The hard barge in with additive noise at 30 dB SNR. A robust scorer still marks a yield.

cases.title: Hard barge-in under seeded packet dropout
cases.note: The hard barge in with three seeded 60 ms dropout gaps. A robust scorer still marks a yield.
